answers: Wrestling = grappling sport. Takedowns, pins, and control. One of the oldest sports and Olympic disciplines.
Basics: stance, penetration step, single/double leg takedowns, sprawl defense, and pinning combinations.
Benefits: incredible strength and conditioning, mental toughness, body awareness, and self-defense foundation.
Start wrestling: join a club or school team, learn fundamentals, drill positions, and build strength/endurance.
